messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Front-desk supervisor must kill a presumed-unhealthy bot child before spawning its replacement
What it solves: Telegram allows exactly one getUpdates long-poller per bot token; a second
poller gets HTTP 409 and the two bots fight over the offset, producing
unreliable/duplicated/dropped delivery. This is the same "stray orphaned
attempt-2 instance" noted in the 2026-07-14 front-desk park incident,
recurring …
How it works: Restarting an unhealthy bot terminates the prior pid before spawning the replacement
